similar_features.profile_over_mls: app/src/lib/marmot/profileSync.ts — signed kind-0 (SignedProfileEvent) carried in MLS rumors; verifyEvent used at profileSync.ts:135. The card reuses the same signed-kind-0 idea but out-of-band, with a minimal card-specific content.
similar_features.add_contact_by_npub: app/src/lib/contacts.ts addContactByNpub:304 (validates npub, seeds knownPeers per ADR-005, writes lp_contacts_v1); UI app/src/components/contacts/AddContactModal.tsx handleAdd:59.
similar_features.contact_cache: app/src/lib/contactCache.ts writeContactEntry:33 (LWW by updatedAt, LEXICAL string compare at :38; also calls rememberContact:41 which CREATES a contacts entry — relevant to DD 8 group-invite no-cache), readContactEntry:47.
similar_features.own_kind0_broadcast_removed: app/src/context/NostrIdentityContext.tsx — publishIdentityToRelays removed (privacy invariant). Do not reintroduce.

entry_points_for_npub: app/src/components/groups/NpubQrScanner.tsx onScan:(npub)=>void, validates via app/src/lib/qr.ts normaliseNpubPayload:3 (returns npub string or null)
group invite: app/src/context/MarmotContext.tsx inviteByNpub:246 (re-normalises input internally ~1229-1235; stays npub-only, callers down-convert)
architecture.invite_keypackage: inviteByNpub fetches invitee KeyPackage from relays; card carries no KeyPackage — group-add dependency unchanged (DD 8, AC-GRP-2).
architecture.signer: app/src/lib/marmot/signerAdapter.ts createPrivateKeySigner:21, createNip46EventSigner:76, createNip07EventSigner:135 — all return EventSigner{getPublicKey, signEvent, nip44}. Card signing uses the active signer via activeEventSignerOverride.current ?? createPrivateKeySigner(privateKeyHex).
architecture.hash_routing_note: NO existing page reads window.location.hash; all use router.query (groups/contacts/profile.tsx). The #c= fragment is a DELIBERATE privacy deviation (DD 9 — fragment never sent to Cloudflare). pages/add.tsx must be authored fresh with typeof window guards; not a blocker.

testing_and_conventions.framework: Vitest; app/vitest.config.ts include tests/unit/**/*.test.ts; NO jsdom. Run: make test-unit (cd app && npx vitest run).
testing_and_conventions.no_jsdom_rule: Hooks tested via exported pure-function extraction (useThemeStyles pattern). No @testing-library. New card subdir: app/tests/unit/cards/*.test.ts.
testing_and_conventions.crypto_test_pattern: app/tests/unit/marmot/profileSync.test.ts: generateSecretKey/getPublicKey/finalizeEvent from nostr-tools/pure; bytesToHex from nostr-tools/utils; createPrivateKeySigner(skHex); serialiseProfileUpdate signs kind-0. Tamper: flip a sig hex nibble -> expect reject (profileSync.test.ts:111-122). verifyEvent is called INSIDE production code, not tests — tests sign real events and let the module verify.
testing_and_conventions.id_discipline: getEventHash computed once and stored; tests assert id === getEventHash(canonical fields) (reactions/rumor.test.ts:124, messageEdits/rumor.test.ts:138).
testing_and_conventions.signer_mode_stub: NO existing test stubs ndkSigner.sign for NIP-46/07. Shape to stub: blockUntilReady()->{pubkey}, sign(event)->sigHex string (NDK 3.0.3 returns sig string only — memory ndk_signer_api_quirks). Closest idiom: vi.mock nostr-tools/pure + flip return (callSignaling.test.ts:142,336).
testing_and_conventions.i18n_test: feedback.i18n.test.ts REQUIRED_KEYS-loop template: existence+parity for en/de AND de[key] !== en[key] (non-lazy) guard. getCopy(language) at i18n.ts:1436; contacts namespace at i18n.ts:267/756/1230. Add new keys to a namespace + a *.i18n.test.ts file.
testing_and_conventions.qr: GENERATE: qrcode lib, NpubQrModal.tsx:68 QRCode.toDataURL(value,{errorCorrectionLevel:'M',margin:2,width:320}) — value is raw npub. Card share must encode the onboarding URL at ECC-L. SCAN: qr-scanner lib; onScan:(npub:string)=>void; qr.ts normaliseNpubPayload trim->strip nostr:->validate->return string|null. qr.test.ts tests only normaliseNpubPayload (pure). Card needs a new parse fn alongside.
testing_and_conventions.boy_scout: NpubQrScanner.tsx:146 hardcodes 'Starting camera...' (untranslated) — fix when touching.

reusable_utils.base64url: NONE exists — must add (pure, testable). No app/src/lib base64 helper anywhere.
reusable_utils.hex_bytes: Use exported hexToBytes/bytesToHex from @/src/lib/nostrKeys (nostrKeys.ts:59) OR nostr-tools/utils; do NOT add a 5th reimplementation.
reusable_utils.crypto: nostr-tools/pure: generateSecretKey, getPublicKey, finalizeEvent, getEventHash, verifyEvent.

adr_constraints.ADR-005: manually-added contacts seed knownPeers — addContactByNpub already does this; card add path inherits it.
adr_constraints.ADR-003: LWW for metadata — writeContactEntry LWW is the mechanism; card import derives ISO updatedAt from created_at.
adr_constraints.ADR-002: pull-only invitations — unchanged; card does not alter invite semantics.

gaps_flagged: no NIP-46/07 signer-stub test precedent (author fresh per profileSync + callSignaling idioms)
